title: Broke at the table
how: Your bankroll hit zero with no way back into the action.

title: Stranded
how: No stake, route, sale, loan, or cash event could keep the run alive.

title: Captured by police
how: Police closed the room before you could slip away.

title: Taken out back
how: The casino ended the argument behind closed doors.

title: Walked away
how: You chose to leave the circuit before it chose for you.

title: Players Card earned
how: You cashed out clean and left with the Grand Casino Players Card.

title: Rourke showdown survived
how: You survived Rourke's back-room pressure and walked out with your winnings.
